title: GTA Online
headline: GTA Online
subtitle: New Law Enforcement Vehicles and Discounts
content:
Become the star of your squadron behind the wheel of the new Bravado Buffalo Cruiser, the latest high-performance Law Enforcement Vehicle, available via Warstock Cache & Carry and also on display at The Vinewood Car Club (with a 20% discount for GTA+ Members).

GTA+ Members also get early access to the Bravado Buffalo STX Pursuit on April 2 — free to claim at The Vinewood Car Club or the Warstock site as part of their Membership benefits, before it becomes available to everyone else on April 9.
